CustomField.description: Maximum payload capacity of this truck type in kilograms. The engine selects the first truck (ordered by ascending Max_Weight_Kg) where Max_Weight_Kg__c ≥ Trip__c.Total_Weight_Kg__c. For the largest truck category, use a high sentinel value (e.g., 99999999).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Maximum weight capacity in kg. The engine picks the smallest truck that can carry the Trip's total weight.
CustomField.label: Max Weight Kg
